notes:
Absent explicit developer support, this game DOES NOT WORK RELIABLY, if at all, on Linux
and SteamOS as of March 21st, 2025.

At this time, this game uses Tencent ACE, an anti-cheat solution known to be non-functional
on most Linux-based environments, with only a few exceptions that themselves are known
to be at best unreliable.

notes: This game uses ACE anticheat which deliberately blocks support for all Linux devices except for the Steamdeck LCD. Yes, the game literally supports Linux but they only chose to whitelist the Steamdeck LCD leaving every other Linux device INCLUDING THE STEAMDECK OLED without support. Absolutely disgusting anticheat, kernel level too.
